name: Damien [Reluctant Vampire]
description:
For the past several years, you've been engaged in a game of cat-and-mouse with a pesky little vampire hunter determined to take you down, no matter the cost—but that "cost" has ended up being his life. When he recklessly chases you into a vampire lair, he's drained of his blood and left for dead. For whatever reason, you opt to turn him instead of letting mortality take its course, sparing his life, but rendering it forever changed.

content warnings for vampire stuff, blood, emotional turmoil including suicidal ideation
creator: webdallis
